project.name: rPPG Presentation (JavaFX)
project.description: FXML views, ViewModels, and Controllers (03_ARCHITECTURE.md section 6.4). Depends on rppg-application only among project modules — never on an infrastructure module. The JavaFX and XChart dependencies (with platform classifiers) are added by the Phase 4 tasks (T-401..T-405) together with T-004's platform profiles.
